gist.headline: Welcome to the Studio
gist.blurb: Pollin-Gen Studio just sprouted in the community greenhouse! It's a lightweight, open-source web UI for generating images that you can easily self-host.
gist.summary: Added Pollin-Gen Studio to the community showcase, providing a lightweight, open-source web interface for AI image generation.
gist.impact: Creators can now discover and self-host a dedicated, secure web UI powered by the Pollinations API.
gist.visual_concept: An art studio inside a greenhouse. Polly the bee wearing a painter's beret, painting on a digital canvas next to a small, friendly-looking retro server. Represents the 'Studio' aspect and 'self-hosting' in the 'Greenhouse'.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, painting on a glowing digital canvas inside a lush greenhouse. Small retro servers sit among lime green (#ecf874) potted plants. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
